title: lens culinaris subsp. macrosperma
intro: Lens culinaris subsp. macrosperma, also known as the large-seeded lentil, is a subspecies of Lens culinaris, a type of legume commonly used as a food source. The medicinal properties of Lens culinaris subsp. macrosperma are attributed to its high content of protein, fiber, and various minerals, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Lens culinaris subsp. macrosperma include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, managing blood sugar levels, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Lens culinaris subsp. macrosperma, such as tea and decoctions, can be made by boiling the seeds in water to release their medicinal properties.
